query:
SELECT 'contacts_rd' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contacts WHERE source = 'rd_station_crm' AND deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'contacts_all' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contacts WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'deals_rd' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deals WHERE leadSource = 'rd_station_crm' AND deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'deals_all' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM deals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'pipelines' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM pipelines
UNION ALL SELECT 'stages' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM pipeline_stages
UNION ALL SELECT 'tasks' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM crm_tasks
UNION ALL SELECT 'accounts' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM accounts
UNION ALL SELECT 'lead_sources' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM lead_sources
UNION ALL SELECT 'campaigns' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM campaigns
UNION ALL SELECT 'loss_reasons' as entity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM loss_reasons
